title: Scalability Analysis: Paths to Large-Scale Quantum Systems
description: Analyze the scalability challenges and solutions for different quantum computing platforms. Understand qubit overhead, interconnect scaling, and modular architectures.
learningObjectives: Identify the key scalability bottlenecks for each qubit modality
Calculate qubit overhead requirements for fault-tolerant computation
Analyze modular and distributed quantum computing architectures
Evaluate the trade-offs between monolithic and modular scaling approaches
Project realistic timelines for achieving different qubit milestones
